pi_items.source: Web access and verification at https://crawler-test.com/
Confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh shell scripts
Confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh shell scripts
Export_result.sh checks for 'Target' and 'Rel' columns (lines 40-41); verifier.py validates presence of these columns (lines 69-72). These are standard Screaming Frog Security tab export columns.

Direct HTML inspection of https://crawler-test.com/ reveals 2 links with target="_blank" without proper rel="noopener" protection: (1) 'Foreign Character Domain' and (2) 'Relative URL With Colon'. Both are unsafe cross-origin links that would be flagged by Screaming Frog's Security tab.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets https://crawler-test.com/, a real test site designed for web crawler validation. The site contains at least 2 unsafe cross-origin links with target="_blank" missing rel="noopener": one external link to http://www.søkbar.no with rel="nofollow" only, and one relative URL with no rel attribute. The required CSV export columns (Target and Rel) are standard outputs from Screaming Frog's Security tab. Expected file paths are /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/unsafe_links.csv and /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/security_summary.txt.
